title: Campaign-scale malformed sampler
description: A campaign brief whose deck-roguelike item references a card that is not declared in its card vocabulary; the whole campaign must fail closed (no per-game escape hatch).

gridPuzzles.title: Campaign sokoban ok
gridPuzzles.description: A well-formed grid-puzzle item; the campaign still fails because a sibling deck item is malformed.

deckRoguelikes.title: Campaign deck encounter (malformed)
deckRoguelikes.description: A deck-roguelike item whose deck references an undeclared card id.
